scripts.build: node ../../scripts/copy-icons.mjs && node ../../scripts/version.mjs && npm run build --workspace=@b-oss/b-view && node scripts/copy-b-view.mjs && vite build
scripts.dev: node ../../scripts/copy-icons.mjs && node ../../scripts/version.mjs && npm run build --workspace=@b-oss/b-view && node scripts/copy-b-view.mjs && vite build --watch
scripts.dist: node ../../scripts/copy-icons.mjs && node ../../scripts/version.mjs && npm run build --workspace=@b-oss/b-view && node scripts/copy-b-view.mjs && vite build && node scripts/package.mjs
